name: format_code
description: Automatically formats source code files in the project using a common code formatter (e.g., Prettier for web technologies, Black for Python, gofmt for Go). This tool helps maintain a consistent code style across the project. It can be configured to format specific files, directories, or the entire project based on detected or specified configurations.

project_path.description: The root directory path of the project whose files need formatting.

target_paths.description: An optional list of specific file or directory paths (relative to project_path) to format. If omitted, the tool will attempt to format all supported files in the project or use the formatter's default behavior (e.g., respect .prettierignore).

formatter.description: Specify the formatter to use. If 'auto', the tool will attempt to detect the appropriate formatter based on project configuration (e.g., .prettierrc) or file types.

hints.description: This tool is idempotent; running it multiple times on the same code (without intermediate changes) will result in the same formatted output. However, it is destructive as it modifies file contents to apply formatting.
